location: Guaranteed pickup in a chest at the top of the Highway Lookout Tower in Altus Plateau, southeast of Dominula, Windmill Village (not the identically-named Highway Lookout Tower in Liurnia of the Lakes, which holds a different reward). Reach the top by climbing the tower's broken ramparts.
tactics: From the Windmill Village grace, head southeast, veering off the main Capital Outskirts road onto the plateau where the tower sits.
A mounted Leyndell Knight and several soldiers patrol the open fields around the tower — deal with or avoid them before climbing.
Jump up the tower's ruined ramparts on either side to reach the top; the chest there holds the Greatbow plus 20 Great Arrows.
If you'd rather farm than climb, Redmane Knights at Fort Gael and a Leyndell Knight near Altus Highway Junction both have a small chance to drop it instead.
lore: An oversized bow, built on a scale meant for giants rather than people — impossible to draw with ordinary strength, but capable of shots with extraordinary force once mastered. Only massive Great Arrows fit its draw.

builds.name: Quality Str/Dex archer
builds.why: Even D/D scaling on both stats rewards a balanced quality build, matching its even 20 Strength/20 Dexterity requirement.

builds.name: Through and Through poke build
builds.why: Its native Through and Through skill punches an arrow through multiple enemies in a line, useful for thinning weaker foes at range before they close in.
